steps.title: Translate the 4% annual increase
steps.content: The initial population is $15{,}000$, so the coefficient should be $15{,}000$. A $4\%$ yearly increase means each year is multiplied by $1+0.04=1.04$.

steps.title: Build the exponential model
steps.content:
After $x$ years, the factor $1.04$ is applied $x$ times:
$$p=15{,}000(1.04)^x$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content: Choices A and B incorrectly use $15{,}000$ as the exponential base. Choice C uses $0.96$, which would be a decrease. Choice D matches $15{,}000(1.04)^x$, so D is correct.
